description: Admin user management - view, add, edit, block users, send messages. All operations are localStorage-based (no real API).
authentication: No real backend authentication - admin login is localStorage-based
dataStorage: Pure localStorage - key: 'users', seed: usersData import

endpoints.name: Get All Users
endpoints.description: Retrieve all registered users with computed order stats

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Displays user list in admin table. Each user shows name, email, phone, status, join date, total orders, and total spent. Orders are cross-referenced from 'dealora_market_orders'.

totalSpent.description: Sum of totalPrice from matching orders

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Users table with avatar, name, email, phone, status badge (Active=green, Blocked=red), join date, total orders count, total spent amount, and action buttons (edit, block/unblock, message, delete)

endpoints.name: Add User

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin submits Add User form. Validates duplicate email.
frontendUsage.mockBehavior: Adds with auto-generated id (Date.now()), joinDate, lastLogin='-', totalOrders=0, totalSpent=0

body.description: New user object with generated id and defaults

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Shows success toast, user appears in table

endpoints.name: Update User

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin saves edited user. Validates email uniqueness (excluding self).

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Shows success toast, user row updates

endpoints.name: Delete User

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin confirms user deletion

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Confirmation dialog, success toast, user removed from table

endpoints.name: Toggle User Status

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin clicks status toggle switch

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Status badge toggles between green (Active) and red (Blocked)

endpoints.name: Send Message To Users
endpoints.description: Send a direct message to selected users

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin selects multiple users and sends a bulk message. Iterates through selected user IDs, calls complaintService for each.
frontendUsage.mockBehavior: Finds matching users from localStorage, calls sendDirectMessageToUser() for each

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Success toast, messages sent to selected users' ticket threads
